raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a double charge from a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX that occurred on XX/XX/25 and XX/XX/25 for the same amount : {$880.00}. The merchant initially claimed my first payment didnt go through and requested I re-submit my card information. I did so in good faith, and I was subsequently charged twice. 

I contacted Citi immediately and followed instructions to dispute both charges. I submitted multiple documents including : The email from the merchant asking me to re-submit payment My Citi statement showing XXXX charges for the same amount My cancellation confirmation from XXXX showing I was eligible for a full refund Communication with XXXX confirming they only show XXXX transaction on their end Despite providing this evidence, Citi denied the dispute and has refused to refund the second charge. I am now out {$880.00} for a duplicate charge that I believe was caused by a merchant or processing error. This has been deeply frustrating and financially harmful.
